Notice And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-17-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENIVRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT (as to Daiso California, Inc). Appearances: Elizabeth Shoemaker of Teraoka & Partners LLP (981.3100) for defendant and responding party; David H. Williams (510.271.0826) for plaintiff and moving party. Ms. Shoemaker appeared (on first call of the case). The matter was not contested. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. No opposition filed and settlement complies with health and safety code. The case was recalled and Mr. Williams appeared for plaintiff. Order and consent judgment signed in open court. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Court Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
